messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Inventory Management System' for warehouse staff at our retail company. The file should include 7 slides following a utilitarian theme with high visibility colors like blue and yellow. All content must be written in German and the slide size needs to be set to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the output file as inventory_mgmt.pptx. External APIs or web scraping are strictly forbidden. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart when adding charts. Additionally, you must check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text on the title shape. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


SLIDE_WIDTH_IN = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("#1E3A5F")
ACCENT_YELLOW = hex_to_rgb("#FFD700")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("#FFFFFF")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#F5F5F5")
DARK_TEXT = hex_to_rgb("#333333")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#666666")
LIGHT_BLUE_BG = hex_to_rgb("#E8EEF4")

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
TITLE_SIZE = Pt(32)
SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TITLE_SIZE = Pt(16)
SMALL_TEXT_SIZE = Pt(12)


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    if isinstance(color_hex, RGBColor):
        color = color_hex
    else:
        color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=BODY_SIZE, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = font_size
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=WHITE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D0D5DD")
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = CARD_TITLE_SIZE
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = BODY_SIZE
    run_body.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), y_position, Inches(11.73), Inches(0.5))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(24)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), Inches(7.0), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.4))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"Inventarverwaltungssystem  |  Seite {page_number}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D0D5DD")
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(1.5), Inches(9.33), Inches(1.5), "Inventarverwaltungssystem", Pt(48), True, WHITE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    subtitle_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(3.2), Inches(9.33), Inches(0.8), "Effiziente Lagerverwaltung für den Einzelhandel", SUBTITLE_SIZE, False, ACCENT_YELLOW, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(4.33), Inches(0.08))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    company_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(5.0), Inches(9.33), Inches(0.6), "Retail Solutions GmbH  •  Lagermanagement", Pt(14), False, hex_to_rgb("#AAB8C7"), PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Übersicht der Inhalte", TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    agenda_items = [
        ("Systemübersicht", "Technische Architektur und Komponenten"),
        ("Wichtige Kennzahlen", "KPIs für Lagerperformance"),
        ("Lagerlayout", "Zoneneinteilung und Struktur"),
        ("Arbeitsabläufe", "Prozesse von Eingang bis Versand"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y_pos = Inches(1.4 + i * 1.25)
        card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), y_pos, Inches(11.73), Inches(1.0), title_text, body_text)

        num_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.9), y_pos + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5))
        tf_num = num_box.text_frame
        p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
        run_num = p_num.add_run()
        run_num.text = str(i + 1)
        run_num.font.size = Pt(28)
        run_num.font.bold = True
        run_num.font.color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
        run_num.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_system_overview(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Systemübersicht", TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    components = [
        ("Server", "Zentrale Datenverarbeitung\nund Bestandsmanagement"),
        ("Datenbank", "Lagerdaten und Artikelstamm\nmit Echtzeit-Synchronisation"),
        ("Client-System", "Warenwirtschaftssoftware\nfür Mitarbeiter"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(components):
        x_pos = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        card = add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.5), title_text, body_text)

    icon_box_1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CUBE, Inches(2.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2))
    icon_box_1.fill.solid()
    icon_box_1.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    icon_box_1.line.fill.background()

    icon_box_2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CUBE, Inches(6.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2))
    icon_box_2.fill.solid()
    icon_box_2.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    icon_box_2.line.fill.background()

    icon_box_3 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(10.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2))
    icon_box_3.fill.solid()
    icon_box_3.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    icon_box_3.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_metrics_slide(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Wichtige Kennzahlen", TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    metrics = [
        ("Lagerumschlag", "4,8x pro Jahr"),
        ("Bestandsgenauigkeit", "98,5%"),
        ("Auftragsdurchlaufzeit", "2,3 Std."),
        ("Retourenquote", "1,2%"),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, value_text) in enumerate(metrics):
        x_pos = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.15)
        card = add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(1.4), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.6), title_text, value_text)

    chart_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.7), Inches(11.73), Inches(3.5))
    chart_box.fill.solid()
    chart_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_BLUE_BG
    chart_box.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D0D5DD")
    chart_box.line.width = Pt(1)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mär", "Apr", "Mai", "Jun"]
    chart_data.add_series("Lagerbestand (Tsd.)", (420, 380, 450, 410, 390, 460))

    left = Inches(1.2)
    top = Inches(3.9)
    width = Inches(10.9)
    height = Inches(3.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_warehouse_layout(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Lagerlayout", TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    zones = [
        ("Eingang", "Wareneingang und Kontrolle", Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.0), hex_to_rgb("#D6EAF8")),
        ("Lagerzonen A-D", "Regalflächen und Palettenlager", Inches(5.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(7.33), Inches(4.0), LIGHT_BLUE_BG),
        ("Versand", "Verpackung und Versandvorbereitung", Inches(1.0), Inches(6.8), Inches(11.33), Inches(0.5), ACCENT_YELLOW),
    ]

    for zone_title, zone_desc, x, y, w, h, bg_color in zones:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
        shape.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)

        title_box_z = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.1), w - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), zone_title, CARD_TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
        desc_box = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.45), w - Inches(0.3), h - Inches(0.6), zone_desc, SMALL_TEXT_SIZE, False, DARK_TEXT, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    legend_items = [
        ("Eingang", hex_to_rgb("#D6EAF8")),
        ("Lagerzonen", LIGHT_BLUE_BG),
        ("Versand", ACCENT_YELLOW),
    ]

    for i, (label_text, label_color) in enumerate(legend_items):
        lx = Inches(1.0 + i * 3.5)
        ly = Inches(7.2)
        swatch = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, lx, ly, Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
        swatch.fill.solid()
        swatch.fill.fore_color.rgb = label_color
        swatch.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, lx + Inches(0.5), ly - Pt(2), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4), label_text, SMALL_TEXT_SIZE, False, DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_process_flow(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Arbeitsabläufe", TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    steps = [
        ("Wareneingang", "Lieferung prüfen\nund einlagern"),
        ("Bestandsprüfung", "Qualitätskontrolle\nund Zuordnung"),
        ("Einlagerung", "Regalplatz zuweisen\nund dokumentieren"),
        ("Kommissionierung", "Aufträge bearbeiten\nund verpacken"),
        ("Versand", "Ausgangskontrolle\nund Versand"),
    ]

    for i, (step_title, step_desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x_pos = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.6)
        y_pos = Inches(1.8)

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x_pos, y_pos, Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))
        circle.fill.solid()
        if i % 2 == 0:
            circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        else:
            circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
        circle.line.fill.background()

        num_box = add_text_box(slide, x_pos + Inches(0.4), y_pos + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7), str(i + 1), Pt(28), True, WHITE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        title_box_s = add_text_box(slide, x_pos - Inches(0.1), y_pos + Inches(1.6), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.4), step_title, CARD_TITLE_SIZE, True, PRIMARY_BLUE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        desc_box_s = add_text_box(slide, x_pos - Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(2.05), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.2), step_desc, SMALL_TEXT_SIZE, False, DARK_TEXT, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for i in range(len(steps) - 1):
        arrow_x = Inches(1.9 + i * 2.6)
        arrow_y = Inches(2.45)
        arrow_w = Inches(0.7)
        arrow_h = Inches(0.3)
        arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, arrow_y, arrow_w, arrow_h)
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#95A5A6")
        arrow.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_summary_slide(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.6), "Zusammenfassung und Kontakt", TITLE_SIZE, True, WHITE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.06))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    summary_items = [
        "Zentrales Inventarverwaltungssystem für alle Lagerstandorte",
        "Echtzeit-Bestandsüberwachung und automatische Nachbestellung",
        "Integrierte KPI-Dashboards für Performance-Monitoring",
        "Standardisierte Arbeitsabläufe von Wareneingang bis Versand",
    ]

    for i, item in enumerate(summary_items):
        y_pos = Inches(1.5 + i * 0.8)
        bullet_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), y_pos, Inches(10.93), Inches(0.6), f"• {item}", Pt(16), False, WHITE, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    contact_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.0), Inches(10.93), Inches(1.8))
    contact_card.fill.solid()
    contact_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2A4D73")
    contact_card.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_YELLOW
    contact_card.line.width = Pt(2)

    contact_title = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.15), Inches(10.33), Inches(0.4), "Kontakt und Support", Pt(20), True, ACCENT_YELLOW, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    contact_info = [
        "Lagerverwaltung Team  •  lager@retail-solutions.de  •  +49 (0) 30 123-4567",
        "Support-Hotline: Mo-Fr 8:00 - 18:00 Uhr  |  www.retail-solutions.de/support",
    ]

    for j, info_line in enumerate(contact_info):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.6 + j * 0.4), Inches(10.33), Inches(0.35), info_line, Pt(12), False, hex_to_rgb("#C8D6E5"), PP_ALIGN.LEFT)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH_IN
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_system_overview(prs)
    build_metrics_slide(prs)
    build_warehouse_layout(prs)
    build_process_flow(prs)
    build_summary_slide(prs)

    prs.save("inventory_mgmt.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
